emails.subject: Trip to Sydney
emails.body: Trip to Sydney Paul, I am in the early stages of planning my next run to Singapore and Sydney. I was thinking about bringing my wife and staying over a couple of days (or a week). What is the weather like in July and are you going to be there? Thanks, Mike

emails.subject: Trip to Sydney

emails.subject: Re: Trip to Sydney
emails.body: Re: Trip to Sydney Mike Would be good to see you. We will be in the middle of our winter (~60-65 degrees MaxT) in July. Sydney has a relatively mild winter and there is still all the regular sight seeing. I will be here all month. Timing would be good from a business perspective as we look to develop and assist with more EGM opportunities (e.g. grains). Let me know firm timing and we can set an agenda. btw Frevert was here last week and we had a great day on the harbour. Rgds Paul Enron North America Corp. From: Mike McConnell ECT 05/29/2001 11:28 PM
